examples: I wasn't badly hurt, but I injured my thigh and had to limp.
A stiff knee following surgery forced her to walk with a limp.
It was too weak to lift its limp paws.
The girl looked like a rag doll, with her striped stockings and limp bangs.
Quiet, limp as a sack of laundry, he kisses me softly whenever he has the chance.
